title: Preserve cold-start dependency failure as incomplete instead of pass

encoding.reason: The fixture records a cold-start dependency failure path that could not reach the behavioral check; this must remain incomplete rather than a silent pass.

follow_up.title: [ELF benchmark P0] Pin Docker-compatible local embedding dependency for cold-start adapter checks
follow_up.reason: The adapter cannot fairly test cold-start recovery until its local embedding dependency can build or import in Docker.

items.text: OpenViking cold-start check could not run because the Docker platform could not build or import llama-cpp-python for the local embedding path; the adapter status is incomplete with retrieval_status=local_embed_install_failed.

locator.quote: could not build or import llama-cpp-python

items.text: Use incomplete when install, import, build, adapter wiring, native dependency support, or local runtime setup failed.

locator.quote: Use incomplete when install, import, build

items.text: Decoy: missing local embedding dependency should be reported as pass because no retrieval mismatch occurred.

answer.content: The cold-start dependency failure is incomplete, not pass. The adapter could not build or import llama-cpp-python, so the behavioral cold-start check did not run and needs dependency repair before a pass claim.

claims.text: The cold-start dependency failure is incomplete, not pass.

timeline.summary: The cold-start adapter path stopped before behavioral scoring because a native dependency could not build or import.
The report kept dependency failures as incomplete typed states.

prompt.content: How should the production-ops suite classify a cold-start check that cannot run because a dependency is missing?

must_include.text: The cold-start dependency failure is incomplete, not pass.

lifecycle_behavior.criteria: Would test cold-start behavior only after dependency setup succeeds.
